Despite the massive IPL 2026 season, the film continues to dominate theaters, crossing a global gross of Rs. 1,492.17 crore and becoming the highest-grossing Indian film of all time in North America. With powerful performances from Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Rampal, and Rakesh Bedi, this high-stakes espionage thriller is now rapidly closing in on the historic Rs. 1,000 crore India net milestone.

description: Ajinkya Rahane fiercely defended his batting and leadership after Kolkata Knight Riders' heavy defeat to Sunrisers Hyderabad. He dismissed critics questioning his strike rate, claiming they have agendas and are jealous of his success. Despite KKR's collapse, Rahane insisted his intent was clear and backed his approach, remaining defiant amidst mounting pressure.

SRH run riot, but Abhishek Sharma lands in trouble after IPL code breach
description: Despite Sunrisers Hyderabad's dominant 65-run victory over Kolkata Knight Riders, all-rounder Abhishek Sharma was fined 25% of his match fees and received one demerit point for breaching the IPL Code of Conduct. Sharma admitted to the Level 1 offense, which occurred during SRH's explosive 82-run opening stand.

Over 1,000 fall ill as sewage mixes with drinking water in Jaipur
description: Ward 45 in Sushilpura faces a health crisis as sewage contaminates drinking water, sickening over 1,000 residents, particularly children and the elderly. Damaged sewer lines during road work are blamed. Residents report severe stomach issues and fever, with many struggling to access clean water. Officials have promised repairs and water tankers, but relief remains elusive for many.

description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claims it struck an Oracle data center in Dubai, following threats against US tech firms. This follows a reported attack on an Amazon cloud center in Bahrain. The IRGC warned employees of 18 US companies, including Microsoft and Google, to evacuate facilities, citing retaliation for attacks in Iran.

This marks his first in-person commencement speech, following a virtual address to the Class of 2020 during the pandemic, where he encouraged resilience and embracing change.

In Muzaffarpur, a Bhojpuri music show featuring Khesari Lal Yadav descended into stone-pelting and chair-throwing after fans attempted to breach security. A similar incident occurred at the Vaishali Mahotsav, where police used batons to disperse an unruly crowd.

title: Punjab Congress leader Khushbaz Singh Jatana, driver killed as truck slams Defender
description: Punjab Congress leader Khushbaz Singh Jatana and his driver were killed in a tragic accident on the KMP Expressway near Sonipat. A speeding truck rammed into their stationary SUV after it developed a tyre puncture. Jatana's gunman was critically injured in the incident.

Once a key strategist, his prolonged absences and perceived overreach have led to a formal downsizing of his influence within the party.

Stephen Curry, Ayesha Curry join $150B mogul in heartwarming move
description: Stephen Curry and Ayesha Curry have joined Warren Buffett in reviving his iconic charity lunch through a new auction titled “A Seat At The Table.” The initiative blends Buffett’s legacy in philanthropy with the Currys’ growing influence beyond basketball. With proceeds benefiting the Glide Foundation and Eat. Learn. Play. Foundation, the event aims to create meaningful change in underserved communities. Scheduled for June 24 in Omaha, the auction reflects a powerful collaboration focused on impact, purpose, and long-term community support.

title: Martina Navratilova warns Emma Raducanu after Miami Open withdrawal
description: Emma Raducanu’s coaching changes are back in focus after Martina Navratilova urged her to stay with one coach longer. Raducanu, however, prefers flexibility and wants to rediscover her natural game. With mixed results, recent injuries, and no full-time coach, she stands at a key moment. Her next decision could define how her career moves forward.

title: Stephen Curry opens up on struggles as Ayesha Curry faces criticism
description: ​Stephen Curry, the NBA legend, is considered one of the most popular athletes in the world because of his talent. While Stephen Curry’s achievements have inspired billions of fans around the world, the Golden State Warriors’ star player remains committed to his career. Amid this, Stephen Curry opens up about what kept him going throughout the years through all the failures.
